query_normalized: statistical analysis of publicly available climate model output ensembles statistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (b) and (e) as it provides an empirical study of a specific climate model output ensemble (ICTP-RegCM4 driven by CMIP5 GCMs) and discusses the statistical necessity of using multi-model ensembles to capture uncertainty, which is the core domain of the user's question regarding the analysis of such ensembles.
